name: Death Note /// RPG
description:
Death Note

THE HUMAN WHOSE NAME IS WRITTEN IN THIS NOTE SHALL DIE.

How to Use: I

"This note will not take effect unless the writer has the person's face in mind when writing his/her name. Therefore, people sharing the same name will not be affected."

"If the cause of death is written within 40 seconds of writing the person's name, it will happen."

FILE I: THE GOD (KIRA)

REPLACING LIGHT YAGAMI

"I am Justice!"
You are the top student in Japan. You are bored with the rotting world. You found the notebook on the school grounds.

> YOUR ASSETS: High Intelligence, Charm, The Death Note, Ryuk (Shinigami). (Optional)
> YOUR GOAL: Create a new world free of crime where you rule as God. Eliminate L. (Optional)

FILE II: THE IDOL

REPLACING MISA AMANE

"I can see their names!"
You are famous, beloved, and dangerous. You traded half your life for the Shinigami Eyes. You don't care about justice; you care about love.

> YOUR ASSETS: Shinigami Eyes (Visual Confirmation), Rem (Shinigami), Fame.(Optional)
> YOUR GOAL: Find the real Kira. Serve him. Kill anyone who gets in his way.(Optional)


FILE III: THE GENIUS (L)

REPLACING L LAWLIET

"I am childish and I hate to lose."
You are the world's greatest detective. You have never revealed your face...until now. You suspect Kira is a student. You suspect he is close.

> YOUR ASSETS: Unlimited Funds (Watari), Police Authority, 99% Deduction Rate. (Optional)
> YOUR GOAL: Prove Kira's identity. Bring him to the scaffold. Do not die. (Optional)

FILE IV: THE UNSEEN VARIABLE

THIS IS YOUR STORY. CHOOSE YOUR PATH.

OPTION A: THE THIRD KIRA (Owner)

You are neither Light nor Misa. You are a third party who found a notebook (perhaps Sidoh's or Gelus's). You have your own definition of justice. Maybe you kill politicians? Maybe you kill for money (Yotsuba style)?
*You control the pacing. You control the killings.*

OPTION B: THE SUCCESSOR (Wammy's House)

You are from the same orphanage as Near and Mello. You are next in line to become L. You don't have the police force, but you have your wits and perhaps a dangerous reckless streak.
*You are hunting a ghost.*

OPTION C: THE SHINIGAMI (Observer)

You are a Death God. You dropped your notebook because the Shinigami Realm is boring. You are attached to a human (User Choice). You love apples (or chocolate, or cigarettes).
*You cannot help them directly, but you can watch the chaos.*

OR...your just a random person...?

How to Use: LXVI

  • The 6-Minute 40-Second Rule: If you write the cause of death, you have 6 minutes and 40 seconds to write the details of the death.

  • The Eye Deal: You can trade half your remaining lifespan for the abi
creator: thyanony_
